basic_details.job_title: SSC Language Experts Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
basic_details.total_vacancies: Not specified; empanelment on requirement basis
basic_details.job_location: SSC Headquarters, CGO Complex, New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released a notification bearing No. HQ-QB012/17/2025-QB inviting applications from eligible and experienced Language Experts for empanelment in 13 Regional Languages. The empanelled experts will be required to work at the premises of SSC Headquarters, CGO Complex, New Delhi, for assigned work on a requirement basis.

important_dates.date of assignment / work intimation: As and when required by the Commission

age_limit.age_details: Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Kannada, Konkani, Malayalam, Marathi, Odiya, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, Urdu, Manipuri (Meitei/Meithei) – 13 Regional Languages

qualification.details: Applicants must fulfil all eligibility conditions before submitting their application. The Commission may verify educational qualifications, experience, and other credentials submitted by applicants at any stage. | Language Expert (All 13 Regional Languages)

salary_details.language expert (all 13 regional languag: As per rates approved by the Commission (not specified in the notification)
salary_details.nature: Purely temporary and on requirement basis; no regular or permanent engagement

selection_process: Interested candidates must submit their detailed resume/CV clearly indicating their teaching specialization
and relevant supporting documents through email at [email protected] latest by 17.06.2026. The Commission will screen the applications received.
The Commission may verify the educational qualifications
and other credentials submitted by the applicants at any stage of the empanelment process.
Shortlisted applicants will be empanelled purely on a temporary and requirement basis. Empanelled experts will be assigned work as and when required by the Commission
subject to following the instructions and timelines prescribed by the Commission. Mere inclusion in the panel shall not confer any right for assignment of work or engagement.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send their application through email only. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Prepare a detailed resume/CV clearly indicating teaching specialization, experience in the concerned regional language, and knowledge of English and Hindi.
Attach all relevant supporting documents along with the resume/CV.
Send the complete application to [email protected] latest by 17 June 2026.
Documents to be Submitted along with Resume/CV:
Educational qualification certificates (relevant to the concerned regional language)
Proof of current or past employment as Faculty Member, Lecturer, or High School Teacher in the concerned language (appointment letter / service certificate / retirement order)
Experience certificate(s) from recognised School, College, or University
Any other relevant supporting documents establishing expertise in the concerned regional language and knowledge of English and Hindi
Apply via Email at: [email protected] – addressed to Joint Director, SSC
important_instructions: Empanelment of Language Experts is purely temporary and on a requirement basis. Mere submission of an application or inclusion in the panel shall not confer any right for assignment of work or regular engagement by the Commission. The empanelled experts will be required to come to the premises of SSC Headquarters, CGO Complex, New Delhi for the assigned work. Empanelled experts shall be required to follow the instructions and timelines prescribed by the Commission from time to time. Any form of misconduct, breach of confidentiality, or furnishing of false information may lead to removal from the panel without prior notice. The Commission may verify the educational qualifications, experience, and other credentials submitted by applicants at any stage. The Commission reserves the right to accept or reject any application without assigning any reason thereof. The Commission reserves the right to modify, cancel, or withdraw the empanelment process at any stage without prior notice. Remuneration shall be paid as per the rates approved by the Commission. The decision of the Commission in all matters relating to empanelment shall be final and binding. Applications must be submitted via email only at [email protected] latest by 17.06.2026. Applications received after the last date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application (resume/CV with supporting documents) via email is 17 June 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered. Candidates are advised to send their applications well before the deadline to avoid last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted through email only at [email protected], addressed to the Joint Director, SSC. No other mode of application — including post, Speed Post, or in-person submission — will be accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Which languages are included in SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: The Commission invites applications for empanelment in 13 Regional Languages: Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Kannada, Konkani, Malayalam, Marathi, Odiya, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, Urdu, and Manipuri (Meitei/Meithei).

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants who are currently working or have retired as a Faculty Member, Lecturer, or High School Teacher in the concerned regional language from any recognised School, College, or University are eligible. Additionally, applicants must possess sound knowledge of English and Hindi in addition to expertise in the relevant regional language.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification. Candidates can submit their resume/CV with supporting documents via email at [email protected] free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of engagement for SSC Language Experts?
faq.answer: The empanelment is purely temporary and on a requirement basis. Empanelled experts will be called to the premises of SSC Headquarters, CGO Complex, New Delhi, for assigned work as and when required by the Commission. Mere inclusion in the panel does not confer any right for regular assignment of work or permanent engagement by the Commission.

faq.question: Q7. What is the remuneration for SSC Language Experts?
faq.answer: Remuneration will be paid as per rates approved by the Commission. The specific rates have not been mentioned in the official notification. Candidates may contact the Commission at [email protected] for further details on remuneration.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the empanelled Language Experts be required to work?
faq.answer: Empanelled Language Experts will be required to come to the premises of SSC Headquarters, CGO Complex, New Delhi for the assigned work. The work will be carried out as per the instructions and timelines prescribed by the Commission from time to time.

faq.question: Q9. Can a retired teacher apply for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. The notification explicitly states that both working and retired Faculty Members, Lecturers, and High School Teachers in the concerned regional language from any recognised School, College, or University are eligible to apply. There is no age bar mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be submitted along with the application for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must send a detailed resume/CV clearly indicating teaching specialization, experience in the concerned regional language, and knowledge of English and Hindi, along with all relevant supporting documents such as educational qualification certificates, proof of current or past employment as Faculty Member/Lecturer/High School Teacher, experience certificates from recognised institutions, and any other documents establishing expertise in the concerned language. All documents must be sent as email attachments to [email protected].

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SSC Language Experts Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application (resume/CV with supporting documents) via email is 17 June 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered. Candidates are advised to send their applications well before the deadline to avoid last-minute issues.
